chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2795 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.16803/2024. 2. For orders on Misc. No.12686/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 16.08.2024. Mr. Matloob Hussain Qureshi, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. The Petitioner apparently applied for recruitment to the Provincial Police Force as a Constable, but his name was then omitted from consideration, with a perusal of the Memo of Petition containing a reference to an FIR and it being pleaded that the same had been disposed of by the concerned Court under “C” Class, hence could not be made the reason for such omission. However, the relevant Order filed along with the Petition shows the Petitioner to have been convicted for an offence punishable under Section 337-H (ii) PPC. Under such circumstances, the Petition appears patently misconceived and is accordingly dismissed in limine JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR 2
